title: CobblemonsImplemented
body:
**Cobblemon Implement Datapack ** 
This datapack aims to fully implement all missing Pokémon species into the Cobblemon mod for Minecraft. It focuses solely on completing the species files, ensuring that every Pokémon is represented within the game. This includes all necessary data for each Pokémon, such as stats, moves, and abilities.

**Please Note**: This datapack does not alter or add models, spawn pools, or other visual or behavior changes. It is intended for players who specifically need the missing species files to be set to true. For those looking for additional modifications (like spawn behavior or model updates), other datapacks or mods may be required.

**Features**:
- Adds all missing Pokémon species to Cobblemon.
- Only modifies species data (stats, moves, etc.), leaving models and spawn pools unchanged.
- Ideal for players who need the full species file implementation without other adjustments.

Simply enable the datapack, set the configuration flag to true, and enjoy having all Pokémon species implemented in your Cobblemon world!
